ddls:
CREATE TABLE "specimens" (
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specimen */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the person from whom the specimen is collected */,
  "specimen_concept_id" INTEGER /* Standard CONCEPT_ID that the SPECIMEN_SOURCE_VALUE maps to */,
  "specimen_type_concept_id" INTEGER /* CONCEPT_ID representing the type of specimen */,
  "specimen_date" TEXT /* Date the specimen was collected */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time the specimen was collected */,
  "collection_site" TEXT /* Location where the specimen was collected */,
  "condition_at_collection" TEXT /* Condition of the specimen at the time of collection */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the specimen */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study associated with the specimen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_specimen_type_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_type_concept_id") REFERENCES type_concept ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_specimen_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_concept_id") REFERENCES concept ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "persons" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "person_name" TEXT /* Full name of the person */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the person */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the person */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the person */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the person */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the person */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the person */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Consent status of the person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concept" (
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concept */,
  "concept_name" TEXT /* Name of the concept */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Domain to which the concept belongs */,
  "vocabulary_id" TEXT /* Vocabulary from which the concept is derived */,
  "standard_definition" TEXT /* Detailed definition of the concept */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* Alternative names or terms for the concept */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concept_vocabulary_id FOREIGN KEY ("vocabulary_id") REFERENCES vocabularies ("vocabulary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concept_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_concept" (
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type concept */,
  "concept_name" TEXT /* Name of the type concept */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Domain to which the type concept belongs */,
  "vocabulary_id" TEXT /* Vocabulary from which the type concept is derived */,
  "standard_definition" TEXT /* Detailed definition of the type concept */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* Alternative names or terms for the type concept */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_concept_vocabulary_id FOREIGN KEY ("vocabulary_id") REFERENCES vocabularies ("vocabulary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_concept_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_source_value" (
  "source_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source value */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specimen */,
  "source_value" TEXT /* Original source value for the specimen */,
  "source_vocabulary_id" TEXT /* Vocabulary from which the source value is derived */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the specimen */,
  "collection_device" TEXT /* Device used for collection */,
  "collection_site" TEXT /* Specific site on the body where the specimen was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_source_value_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain */,
  "standard_definition" TEXT /* Detailed definition of the domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vocabularies" (
  "vocabulary_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each vocabulary */,
  "vocabulary_name" TEXT /* Name of the vocabulary */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vocabulary */,
  "standard_definition" TEXT /* Detailed definition of the vocabulary */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the vocabulary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vocabulary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etl_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ETL log entry */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specimen */,
  "etl_date" TEXT /* Date of the ETL process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ETL process */,
  "etl_process_name" TEXT /* Name of the ETL process */,
  "etl_process_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ETL process */,
  "etl_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the ETL process */,
  "etl_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the ETL process */,
  "etl_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the ETL process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etl_logs_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "research_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the research study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Current status of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_specimens" (
  "study_specimen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study-specimen association */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research study */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specimen */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the specimen used in the study */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the specimen was used in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_specimens_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_specimens_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, lab technician, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "supervisor" TEXT /* Supervisor of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specimen */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the specimen was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the specimen */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
